title: Elementary Music and Art Teacher K-5 (Part Time)
status: Part Time, .375 FTEMinimum Requirements:Active Elementary Teaching License with proper endorsements authorizing areas assigned.BTS Specialist - Music Degree or Music Endorsement required.BTS Specialist - Art Degree or Art Endorsement required.The salary for this position is assigned to the TT Salary Schedule.To view the salary schedule, please select the following linkTT Salary Schedule.For new hires & rehires, WCSD will recognize no more than thirteen full time, complete years of previous teaching experience when placing on the TT Salary Schedule.
